prompt.name: 模块 A: Action-Type 8 路穷尽
prompt.sub_stage_name: 30 tests, 8 min — prompt 差异化 + 字段校验穷尽 + compose 输出覆盖

test.name: probe 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_probe_exclusive(): """probe prompt 不含 scaffold/challenge/suggest/reflect 的关键词。""" from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="probe", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] # probe 应有自己的关键词 assert "expected_answer" in p or "探测" in p

test.name: scaffold 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_scaffold_exclusive(): """scaffold prompt 不含 probe/challenge 的关键词。""" from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="scaffold", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "steps" in p or "step_count" in p

test.name: challenge 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_challenge_exclusive(): """challenge prompt 不含 scaffold/probe 的关键词。""" from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="challenge", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "objective" in p or "hints_allowed" in p

test.name: suggest 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_suggest_exclusive(): from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="suggest", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "options" in p or "alternatives" in p

test.name: reflect 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_reflect_exclusive(): from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="reflect", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "reflection_prompts" in p or "context_ids" in p

test.name: defer 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_defer_exclusive(): from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="defer", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "resume_condition" in p or "fallback_intensity" in p

test.name: pulse 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_pulse_exclusive(): from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="pulse", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "accept_label" in p or "rewrite_label" in p

test.name: excursion 不含其他类型关键词
test.code: def test_prompt_excursion_exclusive(): from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(action_type="excursion", intent="python") p = ctx["system"] assert "bias_disabled" in p or "theme" in p

test.name: validate suggest
test.code: def test_validate_suggest_missing_fails(): from src.coach.llm.schemas import LLMOutputValidator v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test"}, "suggest") assert not v # missing options def test_validate_suggest_with_options_passes(): v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test","options":[]}, "suggest") assert v

test.name: validate reflect
test.code: def test_validate_reflect_missing_fails(): from src.coach.llm.schemas import LLMOutputValidator v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test"}, "reflect") assert not v def test_validate_reflect_with_question_passes(): v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test","question":"?"}, "reflect") assert v

test.name: validate defer
test.code: def test_validate_defer_missing_fails(): from src.coach.llm.schemas import LLMOutputValidator v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test"}, "defer") assert not v def test_validate_defer_with_resume_passes(): v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test","resume_condition":"later"}, "defer") assert v

test.name: validate pulse
test.code: def test_validate_pulse_missing_fails(): from src.coach.llm.schemas import LLMOutputValidator v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test"}, "pulse") assert not v def test_validate_pulse_with_labels_passes(): v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test","accept_label":"ok","rewrite_label":"no"}, "pulse") assert v

test.name: validate excursion
test.code: def test_validate_excursion_missing_fails(): from src.coach.llm.schemas import LLMOutputValidator v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test"}, "excursion") assert not v def test_validate_excursion_with_bias_passes(): v, e = LLMOutputValidator.validate_with_type({"statement":"test","bias_disabled":True}, "excursion") assert v

test.name: compose probe
test.code: def test_compose_probe(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", ttm_strategy={"recommended_action_types":["probe"]}) assert r["action_type"] == "probe"

test.name: compose scaffold
test.code: def test_compose_scaffold(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", ttm_strategy={"recommended_action_types":["scaffold"]}) assert r["action_type"] == "scaffold"

test.name: compose challenge
test.code: def test_compose_challenge(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", ttm_strategy={"recommended_action_types":["challenge"]}) assert r["action_type"] == "challenge"

test.name: compose reflect
test.code: def test_compose_reflect(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", ttm_strategy={"recommended_action_types":["reflect"]}) assert r["action_type"] == "reflect"

test.name: compose defer
test.code: def test_compose_defer(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", ttm_strategy={"recommended_action_types":["defer"]}) assert r["action_type"] == "defer"

test.name: compose pulse
test.code: def test_compose_pulse(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", ttm_strategy={"recommended_action_types":["pulse"]}) assert r["action_type"] == "pulse"

test.name: compose excursion
test.code: def test_compose_excursion(): from src.coach.composer import PolicyComposer c = PolicyComposer() r = c.compose(intent="test", excursion_mode=True) assert r["action_type"] == "excursion"
